subcodes.first_line: The Book inscribed by My Most Exalted Pen for those who have turned towards God, the Lord of all worlds. Verily, We have given glad tidings unto the servants of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب رقم من قلمی الاعلی لمن اقبل الی الله رب العالمین انا بشرنا عباد الله
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
